## NIM Model Router v0.2.0

Production-ready routing with fallbacks, observability, and Docker deployment.

### Highlights
- **Smarter routing** — `general` tier, confidence scores, tiktoken estimation, request policies
- **Resilient proxy** — fallback chains on 5xx, retries with backoff, shared HTTP client
- **New endpoints** — `/v1/rerank`, `/v1/ranking`, `POST /v1/router/reload`, `/metrics`
- **Security** — optional `ROUTER_API_KEY` for client authentication
- **Deploy anywhere** — Docker, docker-compose, PyPI package

### Install

```bash
pip install nim-model-router
```

Or from source:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/cobusgreyling/nim-model-router.git
cd nim-model-router
pip install -e .
nim-router serve
```

### Breaking changes
- Default ambiguous prompts now route to `general` instead of `agentic`
- Canonical config path is `src/nim_model_router/models.yaml` (removed `config/models.yaml`)

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/cobusgreyling/nim-model-router/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for the full list.
